title: Adapter Memory Specd Data
description: SpecD Studio capability **Adapter Memory Specd Data** (`client:adapter-memory-specd-data`). In-memory `SpecdDataPort` for unit tests and Storybook without network I/O. This spec is canonical after archive: implementers rely on the requirements below, not change-only documents.
context: SpecD Studio capability **Adapter Memory Specd Data** (`client:adapter-memory-specd-data`). In-memory `SpecdDataPort` for unit tests and Storybook without network I/O. This spec is canonical after archive: implementers rely on the requirements below, not change-only documents.

rules.requirement: memory adapter implements the full SpecdDataPort surface
rules: The adapter MUST implement every method group defined on `client:specd-data-port` with deterministic fixture data.

rules.requirement: memory adapter performs no network or disk I/O
rules: Calls MUST NOT open sockets or read the real project filesystem unless explicitly configured in a test harness.

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: memory adapter implements the full SpecdDataPort surface
scenarios.name: Memory port implements every SpecdDataPort method
when: UI invokes each port method with valid fixtures

scenarios.requirement: memory adapter implements the full SpecdDataPort surface
scenarios.name: Memory adapter performs no HTTP I/O

scenarios.requirement: memory adapter implements the full SpecdDataPort surface
scenarios.name: Instances do not share mutable state
when: two tests construct separate adapter instances
then: writes in one are invisible to the other

scenarios.requirement: memory adapter performs no network or disk I/O
scenarios.name: Memory adapter performs no HTTP requests
then: AND responses come from in-memory fixtures

scenarios.requirement: memory adapter performs no network or disk I/O
scenarios.name: Memory adapter writes no project files
when: save or transition port methods run
then: AND workspace artifact files on disk are untouched

scenarios.requirement: memory adapter performs no network or disk I/O
scenarios.name: Memory adapter performs no socket I/O
when: adapter serves a full Studio session in tests
then: no network listeners are opened by the adapter
AND disk reads are limited to test fixtures
